updateNote: Day 65 11:17 PM PT refresh — IDF issues evacuation orders for ~12 southern Lebanon towns (Jibchit, Sarafand, Kafra, Al-Sharqiyah) — signals imminent large-scale operations. Hezbollah fires rockets/drones at IDF (1 intercepted, no injuries). Rubio rejects Iran's 14-point proposal: 'nuclear question is the reason we're in this.' Trump warns: 'if they misbehave... it's a possibility' strikes resume. Iran Deputy FM Gharibabadi: 'ball is in US court — prepared for both paths.' CNN publishes major analysis on Hezbollah fiber-optic guided FPV drones (15km+ cable, undetectable). Netanyahu convenes security cabinet. Jordan strikes Syria. Lavrov-Araghchi call. Von der Leyen: Iran war consequences 'may echo for years.' Brent $111.25 (+39.3%), WTI $103.82 (+37.5%). Gas $4.433. Hormuz Day 62. Lebanon DT ~2,700/8,300.
